title: Capability Gap Analysis
trigger: weekly or when a task fails due to missing capability
description: Scan recent work packets for patterns of failure or missing tools, identify capability gaps, and draft an improvement proposal.

gap_report_cycle1.work_packets_scanned: 22 open PRs (#24, #26-#47); 508/508 tests passing; 23 stub handlers

failure_patterns_identified.description: model.completion handler returned {text: ''} stub. Two active loops received empty model output.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: No receipt.local.query handler existed. Self-Improvement Governor could not scan receipt journal by loopId or date range.

gap_report_cycle2.work_packets_scanned: 24 open PRs (#24, #26-#48); 509/509 tests passing; 21 remaining stub handlers after cycle 1

failure_patterns_identified.description: cowork.fetch-projects returned empty stub. relationship-lifecycle-update loop received no board context. CoworkTracker.listOpen() already existed.
failure_patterns_identified.note: Degrades gracefully when COWORK_TRACKER_URL/KEY not configured.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: api.read.external is a stub (returns {data: null}). Requires design decision on approved URL allowlist before wiring.

gap_report_cycle3.work_packets_scanned: 25 open PRs (#24, #26-#49); 512/512 tests passing; 24 stub handlers after cycle 2

failure_patterns_identified.description: log.relationship-events-write and log.zol-events-write returned mock shapes. Events not persisted to state store despite AtomicFileStore being available.
failure_patterns_identified.note: Uses createStateStore() per call. Degrades gracefully on init failure (non-critical path).

failure_patterns_identified.description: checkpoint.local.write returned mock shape without persisting. AtomicFileStore available.
api.read.external always returned {data:null} stub. zabal-submissions-watch-v1 received no submission data. Only known URL: https://zabalgamez.com/api/submissions.
failure_patterns_identified.note: Conservative allowlist: api.neynar.com, hub-api.neynar.com, zabalgamez.com. New origins require PR review.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: artifact.draft.write returns a draft ID but does not persist the draft content anywhere. Requires a design decision on storage location, format, versioning, and disk-flood protection.
missing_tools_catalogued.blocked_on: Design decision: artifact storage backend (local FS, S3, AtomicFileStore). Formal improvement-proposal needed.

gap_report_cycle4.work_packets_scanned: 26 open PRs (#24, #26-#50); 513/513 tests passing; 20 stub handlers after cycle 3

failure_patterns_identified.description: toolgym.mastery.record returned mock shape. Mastery scores not persisted to state store despite AtomicFileStore available.
failure_patterns_identified.note: AtomicFileStore key: toolgym-mastery-records, capped at 200. Degrades gracefully.

failure_patterns_identified.description: circle.relationship-status-read always returned found:false; write returned mock without persisting. Local AtomicFileStore used as a local-first store (fid-keyed map). Circle API integration is future work.
failure_patterns_identified.note: Map capped at 1000 FIDs; evicts oldest by updatedAt on overflow.

failure_patterns_identified.description: farcaster.recent-casts-parse was already a pure function but only returned bare text summaries. Enriched with music keyword detection (16 keywords), channel extraction, likes, and musicCasts filter.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: toolgym.workout.run loop manifest sends {workout:string} but ToolGymAdapter.runWorkout() needs {toolId, inputs, maxRounds}. Requires a shape-mapping layer or loop manifest change — design decision needed.
missing_tools_catalogued.blocked_on: Input shape design decision: map workout name → toolId + inputs, or change loop manifest.

gap_report_cycle5.work_packets_scanned: 27 open PRs (#24, #26-#51); 515/515 tests; 16 stub handlers after cycle 4

failure_patterns_identified.description: farcaster.activity-read and cast.read always returned empty arrays. zabal-channel-watch-v1 and relationship-lifecycle-update received no real cast data. fetchNeynarWithTimeout already exported; already returns {error} gracefully when key absent.
failure_patterns_identified.note: cast.read accepts both input.channel and input.channel_id (loop manifests use channel_id). Graceful fallback when NEYNAR_API_KEY absent.

failure_patterns_identified.description: telegram.approval.request returned mock pending shape without persisting to ApprovalBridge. Pi Telegram bot cannot pick up requests that are never stored.
failure_patterns_identified.note: Wired to ApprovalBridge.request() with fresh createStateStore() per call. Graceful fallback on failure.

failure_patterns_identified.description: warper.assignment.accept, warper.trapper.release, warper.trapper.sync were in stub list but already correctly implement disabled-mode behavior via WarperKeeperAdapter.ensureAdapter().
failure_patterns_identified.note: No code change needed — removed from stub list, added to wired list. Returns {ok:false, reason:'Warper Keeper is disabled'} in all environments without WARPER_KEEPER_MODE=remote.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: artist-spotlight.* (5 handlers) are stubs. All can be wired locally: filter-eligible-artists + record-spotlight-completion use AtomicFileStore; select-one-artist uses rotation state; compose-spotlight-draft uses ModelGateway; stage-draft-for-approval uses ApprovalBridge. No Pi-specific credentials required.
missing_tools_catalogued.blocked_on: None — all wireable to local state store + ModelGateway. Queued for cycle 6.

improvement_proposal.title: Wire farcaster.activity-read, cast.read, telegram.approval.request; reclassify warper.* (Phase 5, cycle 5)

gap_report_cycle6.work_packets_scanned: 28 open PRs (#24, #26-#52); 515/515 tests; 10 stub handlers after cycle 5

failure_patterns_identified.description: All 5 artist-spotlight.* handlers were stubs. Pi-specific credentials are NOT required — all are wireable to local AtomicFileStore + ModelGateway: filter uses spotlight history for cooldown, select uses rotation state, compose uses ModelGateway.complete(), stage uses ApprovalBridge, record appends to spotlight-history.
failure_patterns_identified.note: compose-spotlight-draft uses mock provider in CI (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY); returns non-empty text either way. filter-eligible-artists accepts input.candidates for candidate injection.

missing_tools_catalogued.description: All wireable stubs have been wired across cycles 1-6. Remaining 5 stubs are correct-as-stubs: cast.draft + farcaster.dm-send (security invariant — draft-only), artifact.draft.write (pending design decision in improvement-proposal.manifest.json), bonfire.delve-recall (blocked on dream-net PRs #1559/#1560), toolgym.workout.run (input shape mismatch — design decision needed).
missing_tools_catalogued.blocked_on: Human decisions: artifact storage backend (Zaal), toolgym shape mapping (design), dream-net upstream (Brandon).

improvement_proposal.title: Wire all 5 artist-spotlight.* handlers (Phase 5, cycle 6 — FINAL STUB WIRING CYCLE)
improvement_proposal.note: All wireable stubs complete. Remaining 5 are permanent or human-gated.
